subject: Fw: FYI
body:
G

PS My e mail has changed to gmax1@ellmax.com - plse make a note

----- Original Message -----
From: Zorroranch@aol.com <Zorroranch@aol.com>
To: Gmax
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com <DKIESQ@aol.com>
Sent: Thu Oct 04 15:12:57 2007
Subject: FYI

Hi,
    Received a call this morning from a female saying she worked for the Associated Press asking if I had any comment on the plea bargain for Jeffery Epstein. 
    I asked her name, she informed me that she was an independent reporter and would prefer to remain anonymous then asked would it be possible to speak to Ghislaine Maxwell or Sarah Kellen for a comment.
I informed her that I was unable to assist her
    She responded, I have quite a few other numbers that I can call for comments other than Zorro Ranch
 
Note: 
As I have done for the last few weeks I answered the phone with good morning can I help you, she answered good afternoon (11:10 am here) Hence assume called from either coast not here. She called on the office line which does not have called ID, was American and I would be surprised if she was a reporter, almost seemed like she was reading her lines, very nervous, but clearly knew she was called Zorro Ranch
 
All the best 
Karen.
